Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Hva skjer i Hadsel?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">

MODERATE

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (7 avvik)7 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><a href="https://www.hadsel.kommune.no/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/SOKNADOMKULTURMIDLERHADSELKOMMUNE2025-2.docx">Trykk her for søknadsskjema</a></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others

MODERATE

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others

MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (6 avvik)6 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

MODERATE

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>

SERIOUS

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" aria-label="andre" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-andre" id="wt-cli-checkbox-andre" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="ytelse" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" role="tab" tabindex="0">

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (7 avvik)7 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="elementor-image-box-title"><a href="mailto:tommy@trollfjordkraft.no">Næringssjef Tommy Løveng</a></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>

SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="e-n-accordion-item-title-text"> Konsesjon og Eiendom </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>

Use only oneelement per page

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-markedsforing" aria-label="markedsforing" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-markedsforing" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-markedsforing" id="wt-cli-checkbox-markedsforing" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" aria-label="andre" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-andre" id="wt-cli-checkbox-andre" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" aria-label="andre" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-andre" id="wt-cli-checkbox-andre" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="ytelse" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-analyse" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-analyse" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="analyse" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-analyse" role="tab" tabindex="0">

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (6 avvik)6 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

MODERATE

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content

SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content

SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility

SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (6 avvik)6 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>

Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content

SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" aria-label="andre" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-andre" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-andre" id="wt-cli-checkbox-andre" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others

MODERATE

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (6 avvik)6 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

SERIOUS

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (7 avvik)7 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Kontaktinfo Hadsel kommune</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content

SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" role="switch" type="checkbox"/>

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-ytelse" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="ytelse" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" role="tab" tabindex="0">

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (6 avvik)6 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Informasjonskapsler</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have only one)

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Use only oneelement per page

MODERATE

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

Link opens in new window without indication

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'switch' is missing required attribute: aria-checked

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

aria-hidden='true' contains focusable elements

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add tabindex='-1' to focusable elements, or don't hide the container
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-funksjonelle" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="funksjonelle" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" role="tab" tabindex="0">

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (22 avvik)14 alvorlig6 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="clr" data-height="74" id="site-header" itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/WPHeader" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='main' on

<main class="site-main clr" id="main" role="main">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='img' has no accessible name

<i aria-hidden="true" class="fa fa-angle-up" role="img"></i>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='dialog' has no accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-privacy-title" class="cli-modal" id="cliSettingsPopup" role="dialog" tabindex="-1">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='button' has no accessible name

<a class="cli-privacy-readmore" data-readless-text="Vis mindre" data-readmore-text="Vis mer" id="wt-cli-privacy-readmore" role="button" tabindex="0"></a>
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Element with role='switch' has no accessible name

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" aria-label="funksjonelle" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-funksjonelle" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-funksjonelle" id="wt-cli-checkbox-funksjonelle" role="switch" type="checkbox">
Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text content

Add aria-checked attribute for proper accessibility

MODERATE

Tab is missing aria-selected

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-nodvendige" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="nodvendige" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="wt-cli-tab-link-nodvendige" role="tab" tabindex="0">
Add aria-selected='true' for active tab, 'false' for others

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

Skriv inn URL-en du vil skanne:

Kopier og kjør denne kommandoen i terminalen:

python checker.py https://www.hadsel.kommune.no --max-pages 20 --format html
